narrative:
Precinct Dover Twp #4/Parral (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 619 registered voters, with 61.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.3%, a modest Republican lean of 2.4 percentage points.
